summary: Incomplete deliverable missing critical files. Test fixtures (tests/fixtures/*.txt) referenced in workflow and test harness don't exist. Jest test files (.test.js) not provided despite TDD requirement. Violates "ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT" by including test-cli-manual.sh (direct Node execution, not workflow). run-act-tests.sh exit code handling broken (line 50-54: `tee` always succeeds, masking act failures). Workflow missing jq installation (sudo apt-get). No act-result.txt output shown. Redundant test harnesses; verify-structure.sh adds overhead without functional testing.
